category_sources: source_facts.description says synchrony is a simple deobfuscator for mangled or obfuscated JavaScript files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives synchrony; source_facts.homepage is the official deobfuscation project page.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project page and best available documentation surface in the supplied facts.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive identify the Synchrony/deobfuscator project, with the matching Relative source repository used as repo.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions JavaScript deobfuscation; source_facts.source-archive is an npm package tarball and source_facts.executables lists the CLI.
